scripts.dev: docker compose up db -d --wait && concurrently --names 'server,client' --prefix-colors 'yellow,cyan' 'pnpm --filter server dev' 'pnpm --filter client dev'
scripts.dev:server: docker compose up db -d --wait && pnpm --filter server dev
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up db -d --wait
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter server lint && pnpm --filter client lint
